name: Mansion #19
description: Al-Shaulah, 'The Sting,' ruled by Mercury, embodies the focused intensity needed to overcome significant challenges. Like the scorpion's sting, it provides the precise force needed to penetrate defenses. Lambda Scorpii (Shaula) marks the deadly sting of the celestial scorpion. The artwork captures this piercing power in Mercury's electric silver-blue palette with sharp, precise geometric vectors representing focused penetration and breakthrough.

attributes.value: Overcoming obstacles, siege warfare, persistent efforts, breaking barriers
